nasb.text: I approached one of those who were standing by and began asking him the exact meaning of all this. So he told me and made known to me the interpretation of these things:

esv.text: I approached one of those who stood there and asked him the truth concerning all this. So he told me and made known to me the interpretation of the things.

cnv.text: 於是我走近其中一位侍立者，問他有關這一切事的實情；他就告訴我，使我知道這些事的意思，他說：

ccb.text: 便走近一位侍立一旁的，问他这些事的意思。他就向我解释这些事的意思，说，
